ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rainfall_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data is associated with */,
  "jan" REAL /* Rainfall in January (in mm) */,
  "feb" REAL /* Rainfall in February (in mm) */,
  "mar" REAL /* Rainfall in March (in mm) */,
  "apr" REAL /* Rainfall in April (in mm) */,
  "may" REAL /* Rainfall in May (in mm) */,
  "jun" REAL /* Rainfall in June (in mm) */,
  "jul" REAL /* Rainfall in July (in mm) */,
  "aug" REAL /* Rainfall in August (in mm) */,
  "sep" REAL /* Rainfall in September (in mm) */,
  "oct" REAL /* Rainfall in October (in mm) */,
  "nov" REAL /* Rainfall in November (in mm) */,
  "dec" REAL /* Rainfall in December (in mm) */,
  "annual" REAL /* Total annual rainfall (in mm) */,
  "jan_feb" REAL /* Total rainfall from January and February (in mm) */,
  "mar_may" REAL /* Total rainfall from March to May (in mm) */,
  "jun_sep" REAL /* Total rainfall from June to September (in mm) */,
  "oct_dec" REAL /* Total rainfall from October to December (in mm) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rainfall_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rainfall_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or union territory */,
  "state_ut_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or union territory */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region classification of the state */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the state was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the state was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the state */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state it belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the district was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the district was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the district */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rainfall_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of rainfall data */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the rainfall type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rainfall type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the rainfall type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the rainfall type was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the rainfall type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the rainfall type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rainfall data being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the validation process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the validation log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the validation log was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the validation log */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the validation log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES rainfall_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rainfall_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the trend is associated with */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trend was observed */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the rainfall trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the trend was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the trend was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the trend */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rainfall_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content or data of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES rainfall_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rainfall data being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES rainfall_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rainfall data being integrated */,
  "integration_system" TEXT /* Name of the system being integrated with */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the integration was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the integration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the integration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES rainfall_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source entry */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the source was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the source */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rainfall data being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_tags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES rainfall_data ("data_id")
)
